blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
